presets.name: Podcast
presets.description: Conversational cuts. Removes dead air but leaves natural breathing room between sentences.

presets.name: Talking Head
presets.description: YouTube-style. Slightly conservative trimming that feels natural on camera.

presets.name: Shorts / TikTok
presets.description: Tight and punchy. Aggressive cuts sized for vertical short-form video.

presets.name: Gentle Trim
presets.description: Only removes obvious dead air. Preserves the original pacing as much as possible.

presets.name: Tutorial
presets.description: For screencasts and how-to videos. Clean silence cuts with enough room to follow along.

presets.name: Aggressive
presets.description: Maximum removal. Cuts every pause tightly — great for fast-paced edits.

presets.name: Jump Cut Vlog
presets.description: Vlog-style rapid jump cuts. Tight but readable.

presets.name: Speed Up Pauses
presets.description: Keeps everything but speeds silent sections up 4×. Useful when you want a continuous take.
